SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OHAYON, MICHAEL TOTAH, MICHAEL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OHAYON, MICHAEL HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
